name: Walnut Chews
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure Special K cereal and crush to 1 1/2 cups. Set aside.
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
3. Place margarine and sugar in a large mixing bowl; beat until light and fluffy. Add eggs; beat well. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients, mixing until thoroughly combined. Stir in Special K cereal and walnuts.
4. Drop by level tablespoonfuls onto lightly greased baking sheets.
5. Bake in a moderate oven (350 degrees Fahrenheit) for about 15 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove from baking sheets immediately and cool on wire racks.
Yield: Approximately 5 dozen Walnut Chews, each measuring 2 1/2 inches in diameter.
